title: Add streaming support for council responses
description: Implement SSE streaming for /api/council endpoint. Stream individual model responses as they complete, then stream chairman synthesis. Makes the UI more responsive for long deliberations.
close_reason: Implemented SSE streaming: /api/council/stream endpoint, stream_council() generator, MCP server SSE consumer with progress logging and sync fallback. Tested locally (5/5, 18s) and on Cloud Run (5/5, 6-72s). Deployed.

title: Complete Cloud Build GitHub trigger setup
description: Cloud Build connection 'llm-council-github' created but PENDING_USER_OAUTH. Need to: 1) Open the authorization link in a browser to connect GitHub, 2) Create the trigger: gcloud builds triggers create github --name=llm-council-deploy --region=us-central1 --repo-name=llm-council --repo-owner=ShreeMulay --branch-pattern='^master$' --build-config=cloudbuild.yaml --project=tke-phi-privacy-engine. Auth link: https://console.cloud.google.com/cloud-build/triggers;region=us-central1?project=tke-phi-privacy-engine
close_reason: Replaced Cloud Build GitHub trigger with GitHub Actions + Workload Identity Federation. Created .github/workflows/deploy.yml and scripts/deploy.sh. WIF pool, provider, and service account all configured.

title: Add conversation export (markdown, JSON)
description: Export council conversations to markdown or JSON format. Useful for documentation, sharing, or archiving deliberation results.

title: Push GitHub Actions workflow file
description: The .github/workflows/deploy.yml file is committed locally but can't be pushed because the GitHub OAuth token lacks 'workflow' scope. Either: 1) Run 'gh auth refresh -h github.com -s workflow' interactively to add the scope, then 'git push', or 2) Create a Personal Access Token with 'repo' + 'workflow' scopes.

title: Add /council slash command integration
description: Create a skill file for OpenCode that invokes the MCP tool with /council command. Should support: /council <query>, /council --fast <query> (final_only), /council --models opus,gemini <query>
close_reason: Completed: /council slash command is implemented at ~/.config/opencode/command/council/
